news_title: CTRL Group Limited Announces Name Change
summary: CTRL Group Limited (NASDAQ:MCTR), a Hong Kong-based integrated marketing and advertising services provider focused on mobile games promotion, has announced plans to change its name toTJGC Group. The name change is subject to approval from the British Virgin Islands Registrar of Companies.The company will maintain its currentNASDAQ ticker symbol "MCTR"and CUSIP number, ensuring continuity for investors. The change will become effective once the Certificate of Change of Name is issued and the Register of Companies is updated.
